query:
SELECT mc.id, mc.name, mc.sort_order, COUNT(mi.id) as item_count
FROM menu_categories mc
LEFT JOIN menu_items mi ON mi.category_id = mc.id
GROUP BY mc.id, mc.name, mc.sort_order
ORDER BY mc.sort_order;
